common.siteTagline: Free Islamic curricula — organized by stage and subject
common.subject: Subject

ask.title: Ask the library
ask.subtitle: Describe what you're looking for in plain words, and we'll suggest suitable curricula from the library.
ask.placeholder: e.g. a concise book on creed for a beginner…
ask.example1: Simplified Fiqh curricula for intermediate level
ask.notConfigured: The assistant is not enabled on this site yet.
ask.disclaimer: AI-assisted suggestions — verify with the source; not a fatwa. For religious rulings, consult qualified scholars.

home.heroTitle: The Islamic curricula library, all in one place
home.heroSubtitle: Browse curricula organized by stage and subject, preview them in your browser, and download for free — no account needed.
home.browseByStageHint: Pick a study stage to reach its curricula.
home.browseBySubjectHint: From creed to grammar — choose your subject.
home.aboutTitle: A free digital library for students of knowledge
home.aboutBody: Manahej is a digital library that gathers Islamic curricula and organizes them by stage and subject. Each curriculum is a single PDF you can preview and download directly, in multiple languages, with no account required.
home.featuresTitle: Everything you need to find the right curriculum
home.feature1Body: Curricula sorted by stage then subject — reach what you want in two steps.
home.feature2Body: Read the curriculum in your browser before downloading.
home.feature3Body: Search by title or author and refine with live facet counts.
home.feature4Body: Arabic and English interface with full RTL/LTR support.
home.contributeBody: Help grow the library by uploading your curricula; they’re reviewed, then published for everyone.
home.faq1Q: Do I need an account to download?
home.faq1A: No. Browsing, previewing, and downloading are open to everyone.
home.faq2A: Yes, all curricula are completely free.
home.faq3A: Each curriculum page has a “Report content” button that reaches the admins.

report.title: Report content
report.submitted: Your report was received, thank you.

upload.title: Upload a new curriculum
upload.draftNote: The curriculum is saved as a draft until an admin publishes it.

footer.rights: A free platform serving students of knowledge.
footer.reportContent: To report content, use the report button on the curriculum page.
